docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED SEP-06-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ABUDIAB, AMJAD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-10-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-10-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF MAX WINSBERG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMJAD ABUDIAB IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY WINSBERG, MAX AS TO DEFENDANT ABUDIAB, AMJAD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-10-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WINSBERG, MAX RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABUDIAB, AMJAD $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,530.00, DEFENDANT CONCEDED THERE WAS NO DAMAGE TO THE APARTMENT. HE IS NOT ENTITLED TO DAMAGES FOR BREACH OF A VERBAL AGREEMENT THAT THE TENANCY WAS LONG TERM SINCE I FIND THAT AGREEMENT WAS NOT MADE UNEQUIVOCALLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
